name: Pan Bagnat (Sandwiches, Monaco Style)
recipeIngredient: 2 small Black olives; rinsed, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the roll in half horizontally. Remove part of the bread to allow space for the filling.
2. Divide all the filling evenly among the 4 rolls.
- Begin by drizzling the bottom of each roll with a little olive oil.
- Add onion, bell pepper, tomato, egg, anchovy (if using), and olives into each roll bottom. The amount of fillings is personal choice.
3. Season to taste with vinegar.
4. Cover each roll with the top half.
5. Serve cold.
Nutritional Information for 1 Pan Bagnat without Anchovies:
- Calories: 141
- Exchanges: 1 1/2 starch/bread, 1/2 fat
- Carbohydrate: 21g
- Potassium: 227mg
- Protein: 5g
- Sodium: 194mg
- Fat: 5g
- Cholesterol: 68mg
- Fiber: 2g
Serves: 6
